releaseNotes:
• Fix: 1×2 multi-view cells now show video correctly. Previously the Row layout gave cells no width, so mpv had no surface to render on — audio played but the screen was black.
• Fix: Long-press any playing multi-view cell to get a menu: "Replace channel", "Full screen", or "Close cell". Tap "More" on an errored cell for the same options. This unblocks a stuck cell without having to exit the screen.
• Fix: Mini-player and picture-in-picture buttons are now hidden while multi-view is enabled. The floating overlay is stopped automatically when you enter the multi-view screen.
